name: Sesame Chicken with Honey Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Chicken breasts, skinless and boneless, poached and cut crosswise into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, combine 1/2 cup of the mayonnaise, dry mustard, and onion; mix until well blended. Add chicken and toss to coat.
3. In a shallow bowl, toss bread crumbs and sesame seeds together. Roll each piece of chicken in the bread crumbs to coat evenly. Place in a single layer on a baking sheet.
4. Bake for 10 minutes, or until lightly browned and crispy.
5. Meanwhile, blend remaining 1 cup of mayonnaise with honey and Dijon mustard. Serve as a dipping sauce with chicken.
